studyName: TOPDECC-Trans-omics for Precision Dentistry and Early Childhood Caries: Genome-Wide Genotyping (CIDR) and Microbiome in the ZOE 2.0 Study

tables.description: This subject phenotypes data table includes cluster ID, sex, race, age at time of examination, height, weight, guardian-reported child oral health status, guardian's education level, case status with respect to early childhood caries (ECC) based on differing thresholds (n=10 variables), continuous measure of ECC experience at various thresholds/considerations (n=10 variables), case status of untreated ECC at various thresholds (n=5 variables), continuous measure of untreated ECC experience based on various considerations (n=5 variables), dental pain due to teething, environmental factors/behaviors that can affect development of dental caries (fluoride quality in water, tooth brushing frequency, sleeping with bottle, dentist visit history, sugar-containing snacks between meals, primary source of home drinking water, whether toothpaste contains fluoride).

variables.name: AGE_MONTHS
variables.description: Age at the time of clinical examination in months

variables.name: BEDWITHBOTTLE
variables.description: Child has ever been put to bed with bottle with something other than water, yes/no

variables.name: BRUSHFREQ2ORMORE
variables.description: Brushing twice a day or more

variables.name: CLUSTER_ID
variables.description: Numeric ID defining the 34 study design clusters; i.e., public preschool programs attended by participants

variables.name: COHS
variables.description: Guardian-reported child oral health status: excellent/very good/good/fair/poor

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Provided written informed consent

variables.name: DENTALPAIN
variables.description: Child ever had a toothache or dental pain not due to teething, yes/no/I don't know

variables.name: DENTIST
variables.description: Child has ever been to do the dentist, yes/no

variables.name: EDUC
variables.description: Responding guardian's education level: some elementary/some high school/high school or GED/some technical or community college/college or more

variables.name: FLTPASTE
variables.description: Use of fluoride tooth paste every times child's teeth are brushed: yes, no, I don't know

variables.name: HEIGHTFEET
variables.description: Height feet component

variables.name: HEIGHTINCHES
variables.description: Height inches component

variables.name: HISPANIC_ETHNICITY
variables.description: Responding guardian's Hispanic ethnicity

variables.name: OPTIMALWATERFLUORIDEIMPUTED
variables.description: Binary indicator denoting directly measured domestic water source fluoride concentration >=0.60ppm F; directly measured for 25% of examined participants

variables.name: RACE_AA
variables.description: Child's reported race is: African American

variables.name: RACE_AIAN
variables.description: Child's reported race is: American Indian/Alaskan Native

variables.name: RACE_ASIAN_NH_PI
variables.description: Child's reported race is: Asian, Native Hawaiian or other Pacific Islander

variables.name: RACE_MORETHANONE
variables.description: Child's reported race is: more than one race

variables.name: RACE_OTHER
variables.description: Child's reported race is: other

variables.name: RACE_WHITE
variables.description: Child's reported race is: white

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Sex, male or female

variables.name: SSBS
variables.description: Daily between-meal sugar containing snacks and beverages: 0-1, 2-3, 4+

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Twice-removed ID from the original data collection identifier

variables.name: WEIGHT
variables.description: Weight in lbs

variables.name: WSOURCE_BOTTLE
variables.description: Primary source of home drinking water for child is bottled water, yes/no

variables.name: WSOURCE_COMM
variables.description: Primary source of home drinking water for child is city or community water, yes/no

variables.name: WSOURCE_FILTER
variables.description: Primary source of home drinking water for child is filtered water, yes/no

variables.name: WSOURCE_NOWATER
variables.description: Primary source of home drinking water for child is not applicable because child does not drink water, yes/no

variables.name: WSOURCE_WELL
variables.description: Primary source of home drinking water for child is well water, yes/no

variables.name: meta_t3_a
variables.description: Case status of ECC defined at the ICDAS>=1 threshold, only considering teeth #F, #G, #H, #I and #J (where plaque for metabolomics was collected from)

variables.name: meta_t3_b
variables.description: Case status of ECC defined at the ICDAS>=1 threshold, only considering the 5 buccal/facial surfaces of teeth #F, #G, #H, #I and #J (where plaque for metabolomics was collected from)

variables.name: meta_t3c_a
variables.description: Continuous measure of caries (ECC) experience, defined at the ICDAS>=1 threshold, only considering teeth #F, #G, #H, #I and #J (where plaque for metabolomics was collected from)

variables.name: meta_t3c_b
variables.description: Continuous measure of caries (ECC) experience, defined at the ICDAS>=1 threshold, only considering the 5 buccal/facial surfaces of teeth #F, #G, #H, #I and #J (where plaque for metabolomics was collected from)

variables.name: meta_t6_a
variables.description: Case status of ECC defined at the ICDAS>=1 threshold, only considering teeth #F, #G, #H, #I and #J (where plaque for metabolomics was collected from)

variables.name: meta_t6_b
variables.description: Case status of ECC defined at the ICDAS>=3 threshold, only considering the 5 buccal/facial surfaces of teeth #F, #G, #H, #I and #J (where plaque for metabolomics was collected from)

variables.name: meta_t6c_a
variables.description: Continuous measure of caries (ECC) experience, defined at the ICDAS>=3 threshold, only considering teeth #F, #G, #H, #I and #J (where plaque for metabolomics was collected from)

variables.name: meta_t6c_b
variables.description: Continuous measure of caries (ECC) experience, defined at the ICDAS>=3 threshold, only considering the 5 buccal/facial surfaces of teeth #F, #G, #H, #I and #J (where plaque for metabolomics was collected from)

variables.name: meta_t8_a
variables.description: Case status of untreated ECC defined at the ICDAS>=3 threshold, only considering teeth #F, #G, #H, #I and #J (where plaque for metabolomics was collected from)

variables.name: meta_t8_b
variables.description: Case status of untreated ECC defined at the ICDAS>=3 threshold, only considering the 5 buccal/facial surfaces of teeth #F, #G, #H, #I and #J (where plaque for metabolomics was collected from)

variables.name: meta_t8c_a
variables.description: Continuous measure of untreated ECC experience, number of non-restored surfaces, only considering teeth #F, #G, #H, #I and #J (where plaque for metabolomics was collected from)

variables.name: meta_t8c_b
variables.description: Continuous measure of untreated ECC experience, number of non-restored surfaces, only considering the 5 buccal/facial surfaces of teeth #F, #G, #H, #I and #J (where plaque for metabolomics was collected from)

variables.name: micro_t3_a
variables.description: Case status of ECC defined at the ICDAS>=1 threshold, only considering teeth #A, #B, #C, #D and #E (where plaque for DNA/RNA was collected from)

variables.name: micro_t3_b
variables.description: Case status of ECC defined at the ICDAS>=1 threshold, only considering the 5 buccal/facial surfaces of teeth #A, #B, #C, #D and #E (where plaque for DNA/RNA was collected from)

variables.name: micro_t3c_a
variables.description: Continuous measure of caries (ECC) experience, defined at the ICDAS>=1 threshold, only considering teeth #A, #B, #C, #D and #E (where plaque for DNA/RNA was collected from)

variables.name: micro_t3c_b
variables.description: Continuous measure of caries (ECC) experience, defined at the ICDAS>=1 threshold, only considering the 5 buccal/facial surfaces of teeth #A, #B, #C, #D and #E (where plaque for DNA/RNA was collected from)

variables.name: micro_t6_a
variables.description: Case status of ECC defined at the ICDAS>=3 threshold;, only considering teeth #A, #B, #C, #D and #E (where plaque for DNA/RNA was collected from)

variables.name: micro_t6_b
variables.description: Case status of ECC defined at the ICDAS>=3 threshold, only considering the 5 buccal/facial surfaces of teeth #A, #B, #C, #D and #E (where plaque for DNA/RNA was collected from)

variables.name: micro_t6c_a
variables.description: Continuous measure of caries (ECC) experience, defined at the ICDAS>=1 threshold, only considering teeth #A, #B, #C, #D and #E (where plaque for DNA/RNA was collected from)

variables.name: micro_t6c_b
variables.description: Continuous measure of caries (ECC) experience, defined at the ICDAS>=3 threshold, only considering the 5 buccal/facial surfaces of teeth #A, #B, #C, #D and #E (where plaque for DNA/RNA was collected from)

variables.name: micro_t8_a
variables.description: Case status of untreated ECC defined at the ICDAS>=3 threshold, only considering teeth #A, #B, #C, #D and #E (where plaque for DNA/RNA was collected from)

variables.name: micro_t8_b
variables.description: Case status of untreated ECC defined at the ICDAS>=3 threshold, only considering the 5 buccal/facial surfaces of teeth #A, #B, #C, #D and #E (where plaque for DNA/RNA was collected from)

variables.name: micro_t8c_a
variables.description: Continuous measure of untreated ECC experience, number of non-restored surfaces, only considering teeth #A, #B, #C, #D and #E (where plaque for DNA/RNA was collected from)

variables.name: micro_t8c_b
variables.description: Continuous measure of untreated ECC experience, number of non-restored surfaces, only considering the 5 buccal/facial surfaces of teeth #A, #B, #C, #D and #E (where plaque for DNA/RNA was collected from)

variables.name: t3
variables.description: Case status of ECC defined at the ICDAS>=1 threshold; i.e., presence of one or more tooth surfaces with caries experience defined at the early-stage caries lesion threshold

variables.name: t3c
variables.description: Continuous measure of caries (ECC) experience, defined at the ICDAS>=1 threshold; i.e., the number of decayed, missing, or filled tooth surfaces

variables.name: t6
variables.description: Case status of ECC defined at the ICDAS>=3 threshold; i.e., presence of one or more tooth surfaces with caries experience defined at the moderate or advanced stage caries lesion threshold

variables.name: t6c
variables.description: Continuous measure of caries (ECC) experience, defined at the ICDAS>=3 threshold;  i.e., the number of decayed, missing, or filled tooth surfaces

variables.name: t8
variables.description: Case status of untreated ECC defined at the ICDAS>=3 threshold; i.e., presence of one or more tooth surfaces with untreated caries lesions defined at the moderate or advanced stage caries lesion threshold

variables.name: t8c
variables.description: Continuous measure of untreated ECC experience, defined at the ICDAS>=3 threshold; i.e., number of untreated moderate-advanced caries lesions

tables.description: This pedigree data table contains family relationships in the format of family IDs, subject IDs, father IDs, mother IDs, sex of subjects, and twin pair IDs.

variables.name: FAMILY_ID
variables.description: Family ID

variables.name: FATHER
variables.description: Father's Subject ID

variables.name: MOTHER
variables.description: Mother's Subject ID

variables.name: MZ_TWIN_ID
variables.description: Twin pair ID

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Biological sex

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

tables.description: The subject consent dataset contains subject IDs consent group information, and biological sex.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Biological sex

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

tables.description: This sample attributes table includes body site where sample was collected and analyte type.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SOURCE
variables.description: Biospecimen source of nucleic acids

tables.description: This subject sample mapping data table includes a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs.

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID
